title: I Don't Need Rescue. The Work Is the Wealth.
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the waiting-to-be-rescued pattern and allowing wealth that comes through consistent, self-directed effort
excerpt: A short energy statement for the pull toward windfall thinking. The release names the habit of waiting for a large, external sum to arrive and fix things; the allow names the real, earned wealth that patient work generates.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice windfall thinking pulling your attention away from consistent effort, or when waiting for something unlikely to arrive has become the plan.

content.text: A short energy statement for the windfall fantasy. The release names the rescue-waiting pattern; the allow names the slower, more reliable wealth that comes through work rather than luck.

I am ready to release every habit of waiting for a windfall, an inheritance, a lucky break, or any external rescue to arrive and fix what I can build myself. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the real, lasting wealth that consistent work generates — knowing that I am the source, and the work is the wealth. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
